text: Stepping from the minimalist hallway into this vibrant exhibition space, I feel a subtle excitement stir within me. The bold text and colors proclaim the essence of innovation and exploration—R+D, the dance of responsive and rapid development. The displays invite contemplation on the interplay of technology and humanity, making me feel both curious and dwarfed by the cascading flow of information and ideas. I sense a gentle awe at being surrounded by human creativity, and a readiness to learn what this place is eager to reveal.
